title: Downloads page loads with filter tabs, list, and per-page count
description: Verifies the downloads monitor page renders its status filter tabs, the download list panel, and the per-page item count.

steps.description: Navigate to /downloads
Verify a status filter tab control is visible (tabs: all, downloading, paused, completed, seeding, error)
Verify element with id "download-list" (role=tabpanel) is visible
Verify the per-page count display containing text "筆" is visible

v4_reason: Downloads Monitor (route /downloads, 256 LOC) is implemented but had zero TestSprite coverage. P0 journey #3.

title: Filter downloads by status tab updates the visible list and count
description: Verifies selecting a status filter tab narrows the visible downloads and that an empty filter shows the matching empty-state message.

steps.description: Navigate to /downloads
Click the "downloading" filter tab
Verify the download list updates to reflect the downloading filter
Click the "error" filter tab
Verify the empty-state text "沒有發生錯誤的任務" is visible when no error tasks exist

title: Expand a download item to view its details
description: Verifies clicking a download row reveals the download details panel for that item.

steps.description: Navigate to /downloads
Click the first visible element matching data-testid pattern "download-item-*"
Verify element with data-testid "download-details" is visible

v4_reason: Download detail expansion (DownloadDetails) had no coverage. Part of P0 journey #3 (expand detail).

title: Parse-failed download surfaces status badge and recovery actions
description: Verifies a download whose filename parsing failed shows the parse-status badge and the parse-failed recovery actions (re-parse / manual entry).

steps.description: Navigate to /downloads
Verify element with data-testid "download-parse-status-badge" is visible for a parse-failed item
Click the first visible element matching data-testid pattern "download-item-*" that is parse-failed
Verify element with data-testid "parse-failed-actions" is visible

v4_reason: Parse-failed recovery (ParseFailedActions, DownloadParseStatusBadge) had no coverage. Connects download monitoring to the parse→match journey.
v4_action: ADD — Tier 1 P0 gap (needs parse-failed seed fixture)

title: Click a poster opens the media detail panel with core metadata
description: Verifies clicking a poster card in the library opens the media detail side panel showing title, year, and rating.

steps.description: Navigate to /library
Verify a grid of media poster cards is visible
Click the first element with data-testid "poster-card"
Verify element with data-testid "media-detail-panel" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "detail-title" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "detail-year" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "detail-rating" is visible

v4_reason: Media Detail Panel (40+ testids) was only grazed by TC077 (subtitle entry). P0 journey #1 (search→browse→detail).

title: Detail panel renders tech badges and file info for an owned item
description: Verifies the detail panel for a library-owned item shows technical badges (resolution/codec) and the file information block.

steps.description: Navigate to /library
Click the first element with data-testid "poster-card"
Verify element with data-testid "media-detail-panel" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "file-info" is visible
Verify a technical badge (e.g. resolution/codec) is visible within the detail panel
Verify element with data-testid "file-info-name" is visible

v4_reason: Tech badges (TechBadgeGroup) and FileInfo block had no journey coverage.
v4_action: ADD — Tier 1 P0 gap (needs owned-item-with-file seed fixture)

title: Metadata fallback states render with a recovery CTA
description: Verifies an item with pending or failed metadata shows the appropriate fallback state and offers a recovery action (search metadata / manual edit).

steps.description: Navigate to /library
Open the detail panel for an item whose metadata is pending or failed
Verify one of the following is visible: data-testid "fallback-pending" or data-testid "fallback-failed"
Verify a recovery CTA is visible (data-testid "fallback-cta" or "cta-search-metadata" or "cta-manual-edit")

v4_reason: Fallback/empty metadata states (FallbackPending, FallbackFailed) had no coverage — they are the failure half of the parse→match journey.
v4_action: ADD — Tier 1 P0 gap (needs unmatched/failed-metadata seed fixture)

title: Degraded health state shows banner and core navigation stays usable
description: Verifies that when the connection health API reports degraded, the dashboard shows the degraded indicator and the user can still navigate to the library and see media (graceful degradation).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "degraded state indicator" is visible
Verify text "degraded" is visible
Navigate to /library
Verify a grid of media poster cards is still visible (core feature unaffected by degradation)

v4_reason: TC047 asserts the degraded state renders; this adds the graceful-degradation slice of P0 journey #4. The degrade→recover TRANSITION is routed to Playwright (mock health API), out of TestSprite scope.
v4_action: ADD — Tier 1 P0 gap (needs health API in degraded state)
